name: A-151
description: Quad bi-directional sequential switch. Each trigger steps a common O/I jack through 4 I/O jacks; reset returns to step 1. Version 2 adds Steps switch (2/3/4) and handles full ±12V signals. LEDs indicate active step.

controls.name: Steps
controls.description: Limits the step count to 2, 3, or 4 — shortens the switched cycle before wrap-around. V2 only.

controls.name: LED 1–4
controls.description: Four status LEDs light the currently active I/O jack.

inputs.name: Trig. In
inputs.description: Advance input. Each rising edge steps the switch to the next I/O; after the last step it wraps to I/O 1.

inputs.name: Res. In
inputs.description: Reset input. Rising edge immediately returns the active connection to I/O 1.

outputs.name: O/I
outputs.description: Common jack — acts as output when I/O 1–4 are driven as inputs, or as input when I/O 1–4 are used as outputs. Direction is determined by patching.

outputs.name: I/O 1
outputs.description: Sequential tap 1 — routed to/from O/I on step 1.

outputs.name: I/O 4
outputs.description: Sequential tap 4 (skipped when Steps set to 2 or 3).

behaviors.name: 4-to-1 multiplexer
behaviors.description: Trigger steps through four source signals, presenting one at a time at O/I. Useful for cycling CVs, VCO waveforms, or audio sources at clock rate.

behaviors.name: 1-to-4 demultiplexer
behaviors.description: Switch is bi-directional: a single signal at O/I is routed in turn to one of the four I/O jacks. Useful for rotating a trigger across four voices or envelope generators.

behaviors.name: Reset-shortened loop
behaviors.description: Send a pulse to Res. In every N trigs to loop just the first N steps. Combined with the Steps switch, produces arbitrary short patterns like 1→2→3 or 1→2.

behaviors.name: Audio-rate wave mangler
behaviors.trigger: VCO square → Trig. In · waveforms → I/O 1–4
behaviors.description: When Trig. In is driven at audio rate, the A-151 switches so fast that the ear hears a composite wave — effectively waveform synthesis by time-slicing between four VCO outputs.

behaviors.name: Voltage range clipping
behaviors.description: V1 modules malfunction above ±8V; V2 handles the full A-100 ±12V range. Attenuate or offset large signals before V1 units, or identify the version by the presence of the Steps switch.

patchIdeas.name: 4-note pitch sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: Four offset voltages → I/O 1–4 · clock → Trig. In · O/I → VCO 1V/oct
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-151:
* Steps: 4
- Offset 1 (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 1)
- Offset 2 (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 2)
- Offset 3 (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 3)
- Offset 4 (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 4)
- Clock (Clk) c> A-151 (Trig. In)
- A-151 (O/I) p> VCO (1V/oct)

patchIdeas.name: VCO waveform stepper
patchIdeas.patch: VCO saw/tri/sqr/sine → I/O 1–4 · LFO → Trig. In · O/I → VCF
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-151:
- VCO (Saw) -> A-151 (I/O 1)
- VCO (Tri) -> A-151 (I/O 2)
- VCO (Sqr) -> A-151 (I/O 3)
- VCO (Sine) -> A-151 (I/O 4)
- LFO (Sqr) c> A-151 (Trig. In)
- A-151 (O/I) -> VCF (In) // timbral cycling

patchIdeas.name: Rotating envelope across 4 voices
patchIdeas.patch: Gate source → O/I · I/O 1–4 → four ADSR gates · each note triggers a different envelope
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-151:
- Keyboard (Gate) g> A-151 (O/I)
- A-151 (I/O 1) g> ADSR 1 (Gate)
- A-151 (I/O 2) g> ADSR 2 (Gate)
- A-151 (I/O 3) g> ADSR 3 (Gate)
- A-151 (I/O 4) g> ADSR 4 (Gate)
- Keyboard (Gate) t> A-151 (Trig. In) // advance on each note

patchIdeas.name: Three-step ostinato with reset
patchIdeas.patch: Steps=4 · feed /3 clock → Res. In for explicit 3-step loop · O/I → pitch
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-151:
* Steps: 4
- Clock (Clk) c> A-151 (Trig. In)
- Clock÷3 (Clk) t> A-151 (Res. In)
- Pitch A (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 1)
- Pitch B (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 2)
- Pitch C (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 3)
- A-151 (O/I) p> VCO (1V/oct)

patchIdeas.name: Krell-style voice rotator
patchIdeas.patch: Self-cycling EG end-of-cycle → Trig. In · four oscillator outs → I/O 1–4 · avoids clicks by switching between cycles
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-151:
- VCO 1 (Out) -> A-151 (I/O 1)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> A-151 (I/O 2)
- VCO 3 (Out) -> A-151 (I/O 3)
- VCO 4 (Out) -> A-151 (I/O 4)
- Function EG (EOC) t> A-151 (Trig. In)
- A-151 (O/I) -> VCA (In) // new voice each Krell cycle

patchIdeas.name: Audio-rate wavefolder
patchIdeas.patch: VCO square at audio rate → Trig. In · four offsets → I/O 1–4 · O/I is new composite wave
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-151:
- Offset A (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 1)
- Offset B (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 2)
- Offset C (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 3)
- Offset D (CV) >> A-151 (I/O 4)
- VCO (Sqr) c> A-151 (Trig. In) // audio-rate stepping
- A-151 (O/I) -> VCF (In)
